creator: kontakt@schweppmedia.de
text:
This happens on amd64. This is an issue with the package, not the port. 

I updated the portstree anyway. This did not solve the issue with the package. I tried to compile the port (qgis-2.18.4_1), but I run into a conflict with py27-setuptools versions. 

I won't be able to solve this conflict right now, I hope to find some time this week.
